description: Curated public, clean-room WinUI 3 application corpus with varied project shapes. Every app is ingested through the macOS compat shadow build for deterministic API, XAML, resource, asset, and project-ingestion inventory. No private product names, repositories, or screenshots are used as evidence.

apps.name: Production Smoke Workbench
apps.exitCriteria: Ingests through the compat shadow build with zero blocking diagnostics, zero unknown surface, and native WinUI reference scenarios; advances PB-007 and PB-008.
apps.description: Navigation shell with MVVM form inputs, command surfaces, list/items controls, status controls, and light/dark/high-contrast theme dictionaries.

apps.name: Public Admin Workbench
apps.exitCriteria: Ingests through the compat shadow build with zero blocking diagnostics, zero unknown surface, and native WinUI reference scenarios; advances PB-007 and PB-008.
apps.description: Navigation shell with pane footer account surface, command bar decisions, review queue list, and localization metadata via x:Uid.

apps.name: Single Window App
apps.exitCriteria: Ingests through the compat shadow build with zero blocking diagnostics and zero unknown surface; advances PB-007.
apps.description: Minimal single-window layout with no navigation shell: stack layout, text, text input, automation name, and a click command.

apps.name: Settings Form App
apps.exitCriteria: Ingests through the compat shadow build with zero blocking diagnostics and zero unknown surface; two-way {Binding} resolves against an INotifyPropertyChanged view model; advances PB-007.
apps.description: Scrollable settings form with two-way data binding, INotifyPropertyChanged view model, toggle/check input, combo selection, and status info bar.

apps.name: Resource Catalog App
apps.exitCriteria: Ingests through the compat shadow build with zero blocking diagnostics and zero unknown surface; merged dictionaries, theme dictionaries, static/theme resources, styles, and packaging-like assets are classified; advances PB-001 and PB-007.
apps.description: Resource-heavy, packaging-like layout with XamlControlsResources merged dictionary, light/dark/high-contrast theme dictionaries, static/theme resource tokens, a style setter, and an Assets content file.
